name: kimi-codex-bridge
description: Codex MCP tools for starting Kimi Web and managing Kimi Code CLI sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Control Kimi Code CLI sessions from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Starts a local Kimi Web backend and exposes MCP tools for creating, listing, talking to, steering, canceling, updating, forking, and deleting Kimi Code CLI sessions.
defaultPrompt: Start Kimi Web and show status
Create a Kimi session for this repo
Ask Kimi to review the current project
